name: South Korea
summary: Day 69 Thursday. **KOSPI 7,485.20 (+1.4% 1D, +37.3% 1M, +41.3% 3M) NEW RECORD; SAMSUNG $1T MARKET CAP HOLDING; APPLE-SAMSUNG-INTEL CHIP-TALK HALO INTACT.** Bloomberg May 5 confirmed Apple has held early talks with Intel and Samsung about producing iPhone main-device chips in the US, currently relying almost entirely on TSMC Taiwan. Critical caveat per Bloomberg: 'talks remain preliminary and no orders have been placed' — rally is anticipatory. Samsung Q1 2026 net profits 57.2T KRW (~$39B) — single-quarter higher than ALL of 2025 combined. USD/KRW ₩1,451.68 (-1.5% 1D, -3.2% 1M) on broad EM-FX strength + DXY 4-year low. AI capex demand has structurally separated from West Asia geopolitics for major Asian tech exporters; same is NOT true for Asian importers (India). Helium-cascade thesis remains FALSIFIED at tier-1 chipmaker level (Samsung Q1 + SK Hynix framings hold). **Today's KOSPI continuation is the structural confirmation of the AI-cycle decoupling thesis** — peace-dividend session adds tailwind on top of AI cycle. For India deployment: Korea continues to outperform in AI-cycle bifurcation thesis vs Indian-equity allocation.

active_triggers.condition: Samsung or SK Hynix announces production halt due to helium shortage
